name: hyperclaw
description: Local-first Hyperclaw cockpit plugin for Codex, Hermes, OpenClaw, Claude Code, and MCP-speaking agents.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the local Hyperclaw connector from every agent runtime.
interface.longDescription: Hyperclaw turns Codex, Hermes, OpenClaw, Claude Code, and future MCP-speaking agents into first-class operators inside the local Hyperclaw cockpit. The plugin exposes the connector's live agent, project, workflow, knowledge, task, credential, runtime, and notification surfaces without bypassing the connector boundary.
defaultPrompt: List my Hyperclaw agents and their status.
Create a project and assign an agent team.
